summary: Admin settings feature testing - All backend tests passed (6/6). All frontend tests passed. Admin can configure PayPal link and contact email from Postavke tab. Settings persist to database. About page reads PayPal link from backend. All existing features continue to work.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Settings are stored in app_settings collection with id='main'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin settings feature fully functional. Admin panel has two tabs: Lokacije (locations list) and Postavke (settings). Postavke tab shows PayPal link input and contact email input. Settings are saved via PUT /api/admin/settings (requires admin auth). Settings are read via GET /api/settings (public endpoint). About page fetches settings on load and uses paypal_link for donation button. All previous features (map, search, categories, location management, push notifications) continue to work correctly.

backend_tests.test_get_settings_public: ✓ GET /api/settings returns settings (public endpoint, no auth required)
backend_tests.test_update_settings_with_admin_auth: ✓ PUT /api/admin/settings updates settings successfully with admin token
backend_tests.test_update_settings_partial: ✓ PUT /api/admin/settings allows partial updates (only paypal_link or only contact_email)
backend_tests.test_settings_default_values: ✓ GET /api/settings returns proper structure with defaults

frontend_tests.admin_login: ✓ Admin login works with credentials from test_credentials.md
frontend_tests.tabs_visible: ✓ Both tabs visible (Lokacije and Postavke) with testID='tab-locations' and testID='tab-settings'
frontend_tests.settings_tab_click: ✓ Clicking Postavke tab switches view to settings
frontend_tests.settings_inputs_visible: ✓ Settings view shows PayPal link input (testID='paypal-link-input'), contact email input (testID='contact-email-input'), and save button (testID='save-settings-btn')
frontend_tests.settings_fill: ✓ Settings inputs can be filled with values
frontend_tests.settings_persist: ✓ Settings persist after tab switch (values remain after switching to Lokacije and back to Postavke)
frontend_tests.about_page_navigation: ✓ About page loads from heart button on main map
frontend_tests.about_page_donation: ✓ About page shows donation section with donate button
frontend_tests.main_page_navigation: ✓ Back navigation works from admin panel and about page
frontend_tests.main_page_functionality: ✓ Main page fully functional after testing

integration_tests.backend_frontend_integration: ✓ Frontend saves settings to backend via PUT /api/admin/settings
integration_tests.settings_persistence: ✓ Settings saved to MongoDB app_settings collection
integration_tests.settings_retrieval: ✓ About page fetches settings from GET /api/settings on load
integration_tests.paypal_link_usage: ✓ About page uses paypal_link from backend settings for donation button

backend_endpoints.GET_api_settings: ✓ Working - Returns settings with id, paypal_link, contact_email (public endpoint)
backend_endpoints.PUT_api_admin_settings: ✓ Working - Updates settings (requires admin auth, validates non-empty data)

admin_panel_ui.tabs: ✓ Working - Two tabs: Lokacije (locations) and Postavke (settings)
admin_panel_ui.settings_view: ✓ Working - Shows PayPal link input, contact email input, save button
admin_panel_ui.paypal_input: ✓ Working - TextInput with testID='paypal-link-input', placeholder shows example
admin_panel_ui.contact_input: ✓ Working - TextInput with testID='contact-email-input', email keyboard type
admin_panel_ui.save_button: ✓ Working - Calls PUT /api/admin/settings with Authorization header
admin_panel_ui.success_feedback: ✓ Working - Alert shown on successful save
admin_panel_ui.error_handling: ✓ Working - Alert shown on save error

about_page_integration.settings_fetch: ✓ Working - useEffect fetches settings from GET /api/settings on mount
about_page_integration.paypal_link_state: ✓ Working - Sets paypalLink state from backend response
about_page_integration.contact_email_state: ✓ Working - Sets contactEmail state from backend response
about_page_integration.donation_button: ✓ Working - Uses paypalLink for PayPal.me URL
about_page_integration.fallback_handling: ✓ Working - Shows alert if paypalLink is empty

data_persistence.mongodb_storage: ✓ Working - Settings stored in app_settings collection with id='main'
data_persistence.upsert_logic: ✓ Working - Backend uses upsert to create or update settings
data_persistence.partial_updates: ✓ Working - Only provided fields are updated, others remain unchanged

backend.endpoint_structure: ✓ Proper REST API structure (GET for read, PUT for update)
backend.authentication: ✓ PUT endpoint requires admin auth via get_current_user dependency
backend.authorization: ✓ Checks user role == 'admin' before allowing updates
backend.validation: ✓ Validates non-empty update data (400 if empty)
backend.pydantic_models: ✓ AppSettingsUpdate model with Optional fields for partial updates
backend.mongodb_operations: ✓ Uses update_one with upsert=True for settings
backend.response_format: ✓ Returns updated settings after save, excludes _id

frontend_admin_panel.state_management: ✓ Uses useState for paypalLink, contactEmail, settingsSaving, showSettings
frontend_admin_panel.tab_state: ✓ showSettings boolean controls which view is displayed
frontend_admin_panel.api_calls: ✓ Uses axios with Authorization header for PUT request
frontend_admin_panel.input_handling: ✓ TextInput with value and onChangeText for controlled inputs
frontend_admin_panel.save_logic: ✓ Sends paypal_link and contact_email to backend
frontend_admin_panel.loading_state: ✓ settingsSaving state shows ActivityIndicator during save
frontend_admin_panel.success_feedback: ✓ Alert.alert shows success message after save
frontend_admin_panel.error_feedback: ✓ Alert.alert shows error message on failure
frontend_admin_panel.testid_attributes: ✓ All interactive elements have testID for testing

frontend_about_page.settings_fetch: ✓ useEffect with empty dependency array fetches settings on mount
frontend_about_page.url_validation: ✓ Checks if paypalLink is empty before opening
frontend_about_page.url_formatting: ✓ Adds https:// if not present, appends amount and currency

admin_panel_tabs.layout: ✓ Clean tab row with two equal-width tabs
admin_panel_tabs.active_state: ✓ Active tab has primary color background, inactive has surface color
admin_panel_tabs.icons: ✓ Location icon for Lokacije, cog icon for Postavke

settings_view.sections: ✓ Clear sections for PayPal Donacija and Kontakt Email
settings_view.descriptions: ✓ Helpful description text for PayPal section
settings_view.input_styling: ✓ Consistent with other inputs in app (background, border, padding)
settings_view.hint_text: ✓ Example PayPal link shown below input
settings_view.save_button: ✓ Full-width button with primary color, checkmark icon

mobile_optimization.keyboard: ✓ Email keyboard for contact email input

regression_testing.admin_panel_locations: ✓ Lokacije tab still shows location list with edit/delete buttons
regression_testing.location_cards: ✓ Location cards display and are clickable
regression_testing.about_page: ✓ About page loads with donation section
regression_testing.navigation: ✓ All navigation (back buttons, tab switches) works correctly

GET_api_settings.status: ✓ Working - Returns correct settings from database
